name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual log generation causes late compliance reports. We automate compliance audit logs instead of manual log generation and tracking.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely compliance audit logs.
